title: T-066 — Docs: TEC-031 Regulatory Compliance Dashboard prototype gap brief
prompt: Write engineering brief for missing TEC-031 'Regulatory Compliance Dashboard' prototype per §9.5 [NO-PROTOTYPE-YET]. Output: design/specs/TEC-031-regulatory-dashboard.md covering: KPI tile per regulation (EU 1169/2011, FSMA 204, BRCGS v9, ISO 22000, EU 2023/915, GS1 Digital Link, Peppol) + per-FG flag table (missing shelf-life / missing allergen declaration / missing BRCGS training link). Include the V-TEC-30..33 surfacing rules. Until prototype lands, T3-ui implementation task is OUT OF SCOPE for Phase 1.

pipeline_inputs.details: Document each regulation tile (data source + threshold), the per-FG flag table contract, and the ATP/cleaning evidence cross-link to 09-QUALITY.
acceptance_criteria: Given the brief, when reviewed, then it lists 7 regulation tiles, their data sources, and threshold rules.
Given the brief, when read by a UX designer, then it is sufficient to draft the prototype.
risk_red_lines: Do not bind hard data sources that are not yet shipped.
